summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 new Universal Privacy Layer features (P1/P2). All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend landing page verified working. Dashboard with new feature tiles requires wallet connection (expected behavior).
passed_tests: === ZKP PROOFS (Feature 1) ===
POST /api/zkp/generate-inputs → 200, generates ZKP inputs with stealth_address_hash, spend_key_commitment, view_key_commitment, nullifier, timestamp
POST /api/zkp/submit-proof (valid format) → 200, status='verified', proof verified successfully
POST /api/zkp/submit-proof (invalid format) → 200, status='invalid', correctly rejects malformed proofs
GET /api/zkp/proof/{proof_id} → 200, retrieves proof status with proof_type, public_inputs, proof data
GET /api/zkp/proof/{invalid_id} → 404, correctly returns not found
=== ON-CHAIN RELAYER (Feature 2) ===
POST /api/relayer/prepare-tx → 200, prepares relayer tx with to, value, data, gas, gasPrice, chainId, fee_bps, fee_amount, net_amount
POST /api/relayer/prepare-tx (multiple chains) → 200, works on base, arbitrum, polygon, optimism
POST /api/relayer/prepare-tx (invalid chain) → 400, correctly rejects invalid chain
GET /api/relayer/stats/base → 200, returns relayer_address, total_relayed, fee_bps, fee_percentage
GET /api/relayer/stats/{invalid} → 400, correctly rejects invalid chain
=== CROSS-CHAIN SPLIT (Feature 3) ===
POST /api/split/prepare → 200, creates split plan with split_id, total_amount, num_chains, transactions array
POST /api/split/prepare (invalid %) → 400, correctly rejects percentages not totaling 100%
GET /api/split/{split_id} → 200, retrieves split status with from_address, total_amount_wei, transactions, status
GET /api/split/{invalid_id} → 404, correctly returns not found
=== ENCRYPTED MESSAGING (Feature 4) ===
POST /api/messaging/send → 200, sends encrypted message with message_id, encrypted_content, recipient
POST /api/messaging/send (with tx attachment) → 200, attaches transaction hash to message
GET /api/messaging/inbox/{address} → 200, retrieves inbox with messages, total_count, unread_count
GET /api/messaging/inbox/{empty_address} → 200, returns empty inbox correctly
=== MULTISIG PRIVACY (Feature 5) ===
POST /api/multisig/create → 200, creates multisig with multisig_id, name, owners, threshold, chain
POST /api/multisig/create (invalid threshold) → 400, rejects threshold > owners and threshold < 1
POST /api/multisig/propose → 200, creates proposal with proposal_id, to_address, amount, threshold, status='pending'
POST /api/multisig/propose (non-owner) → 403, correctly rejects non-owner proposals
POST /api/multisig/sign → 200, signs proposal, tracks signatures_count, threshold_reached, status
POST /api/multisig/sign (threshold reached) → 200, status changes to 'ready_to_execute'
POST /api/multisig/sign (duplicate) → 400, correctly rejects duplicate signatures
GET /api/multisig/{multisig_id} → 200, retrieves multisig details with proposals
GET /api/multisig/{invalid_id} → 404, correctly returns not found
GET /api/multisig/user/{address} → 200, retrieves user's multisigs with count
=== FRONTEND ===
Landing page loads with globe animation, '7 Live' badge, 'CONNECT' button
All 9 chain badges displayed (Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, BNB Chain, Avalanche, Hyperliquid, Solana, Sui)
Dashboard components defined: ZKPProofs, OnChainRelayer, CrossChainSplit, EncryptedMessaging, MultisigPrivacy
Dashboard 'Advanced Privacy' section has 8 tiles including new features
Dashboard 'More Tools' section has 4 tiles
seed_data_creation: Test data created: ZKP proofs, relayer transactions, cross-chain splits, encrypted messages, multisig wallets with proposals and signatures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features (ZKP Proofs, On-Chain Relayer, Cross-Chain Split, Encrypted Messaging, Multisig Privacy) are fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs at /api/zkp/*, /api/relayer/*, /api/split/*, /api/messaging/*, /api/multisig/* all working correctly. Frontend Dashboard has 'Advanced Privacy' section with 8 tiles (including 5 new features) and 'More Tools' section with 4 tiles. Dashboard requires wallet connection to view - this is expected behavior. ZKP proof verification is MOCKED (format check only, not cryptographic validity).

mocked_apis.ZKP proof verification: Simulated - checks proof format (proof_a length=2, proof_b length=2, proof_c length=2) but does not perform actual cryptographic verification
